Deal.title: Deal
Deal.description: A referral deal or coupon code.

name.description: The name of the tool or service.

price.description: The discount or price display (e.g. $20 OFF).

category.description: The category of the deal (e.g. Hosting, AI).

icon.description: An emoji or icon representing the tool.

description.description: A short description of the deal.

authorUid.description: The UID of the admin who added the deal.

deals.description: Collection of referral deals and coupon codes.
